description: Size-aware inference test: M-size model (Snag Tights Model C) trying on XL Cropped Borg Aviator Jacket Black

garment.name: Cropped Borg Aviator Jacket Black
garment.note: Garment image is background-removed preprocessed PNG from tryon_output pipeline

run_command: python run_pipeline.py --person_image data/test_inputs/person_model_C_Pixie.jpg --garment_image data/test_inputs/garment_cropped_borg_aviator_jacket_black.png --person_size M --target_size XL --garment_type top --ckpt_dir ./ckpt --output_dir ./output --steps 30 --guidance_scale 2.0 --seed 42 --device cuda
